- Staff must log in with individual accounts before accessing any page

data.reasoningText:
Good, the template already has `AuthorizeRouteView` with `RedirectToLogin` for unauthorized users. Now I need to build out the application. Let me plan the data model and pages:

**Data Models:**
- Owner (name, phone, email, address)
- Pet (name, species, breed, date of birth, weight, owner)
- Appointment (pet, date/time, reason, status, notes, veterinarian)
- Treatment (pet, date, description, medication, notes, veterinarian)
- Invoice (pet, owner, date, items, total, status)
- InvoiceItem (description, quantity, unit price)


- Payment (invoice, date, amount, method)

**Pages:**
1. Dashboard (Home) - overview with today's appointments, recent activity
2. Patients - list, register, edit pets with owner info, medical history, treatment notes
3. Appointments - calendar view, create/reschedule/cancel, availability
4. Billing - invoices, payments, history

I'll build this myself step by step to maintain precise control. Starting with the models, then DbContext, then pages.

@page "/" @rendermode InteractiveServer @using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization @using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore @using VetClinic.Data @attribute [Authorize] @inject IDbContextFactory DbFactory @inject NavigationManager Nav Dashboard — VetClinic

🐾 Clinic Dashboard

Today's Appointments

@todayAppointments

Registered Patients

@totalPets

Outstanding Invoices

@outstandingInvoices

This Week's Revenue

$@weekRevenue.ToString("N2")

Today's Schedule
@if (todaySchedule.Count == 0) {

No appointments scheduled for today.

} else { @foreach (var apt in todaySchedule) { }
TimePetReasonStatus
@apt.StartTime.ToLocalTime().ToString("h:mm tt") @apt.Pet.Name (@apt.Pet.Species) @apt.Reason @apt.Status
}
Quick Actions
Recent Treatments
@if (recentTreatments.Count == 0) {

No recent treatments.

} else { @foreach (var t in recentTreatments) { }
DatePetTreatmentVet
@t.Date.ToLocalTime().ToString("MMM dd") @t.Pet.Name @t.Description @t.Veterinarian
}
@code { private int todayAppointments, totalPets, outstandingInvoices; private decimal weekRevenue; private List todaySchedule = []; private List recentTreatments = []; protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync() { await using var db = await DbFactory.CreateDbContextAsync(); var today = DateTime.UtcNow.Date; var tomorrow = today.AddDays(1); var weekAgo = today.AddDays(-7); todayAppointments = await db.Appointments.CountAsync(a => a.StartTime >= today && a.StartTime < tomorrow && a.Status != AppointmentStatus.Cancelled); totalPets = await db.Pets.CountAsync(); outstandingInvoices = await db.Invoices.CountAsync(i => i.Status == InvoiceStatus.Issued || i.Status == InvoiceStatus.PartiallyPaid || i.Status == InvoiceStatus.Overdue); weekRevenue = await db.Payments.Where(p => p.Date >= weekAgo && p.Status == PaymentStatus.Completed).SumAsync(p => p.Amount); todaySchedule = await db.Appointments .Include(a => a.Pet) .Where(a => a.StartTime >= today && a.StartTime < tomorrow) .OrderBy(a => a.StartTime) .Take(10) .ToListAsync(); recentTreatments = await db.Treatments .Include(t => t.Pet) .OrderByDescending(t => t.Date) .Take(5) .ToListAsync(); } private string StatusColor(AppointmentStatus s) => s switch { AppointmentStatus.Scheduled => "primary", AppointmentStatus.CheckedIn => "info", AppointmentStatus.InProgress => "warning", AppointmentStatus.Completed => "success", AppointmentStatus.Cancelled => "secondary", AppointmentStatus.NoShow => "danger", _ => "secondary" }; }

data.content:
The Blazor veterinary clinic app is ready. Here's what was built:

**Project:** `VetClinic/` — .NET 10 Blazor Web App (Interactive Server)

### Pages
| Route | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `/` | Dashboard — stats, today's schedule, quick actions |
| `/patients` | Search/list patients with filters |
| `/patients/new` | Register pet + owner (new or existing) |
| `/patients/{id}` | View/edit pet & owner, medical history, add treatments |
| `/appointments` | Weekly calendar with status workflow (check-in → complete) |
| `/appointments/new` | Schedule with real-time slot availability & conflict detection |
| `/billing` | Invoices list + payment history tabs |
| `/billing/new-invoice` | Create invoice with line items & quick-add services |

### Key details
- **Auth:** ASP.NET Core Identity — every page requires login, accounts via `/Account/Register` and `/Account/Login`
- **Data:** SQLite with EF Core, auto-migrates on startup
- **Appointments:** Reschedule modal with vet conflict detection, status badges
- **Billing:** Payment processing modal, balance tracking, invoice status updates

### Run it
```bash
cd VetClinic && dotnet run
```
